response.justification: While this candidate has 15+ years of strong software development experience and some systems-level work, they are fundamentally misaligned with the role's core requirements. Most critically, there is no evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency (a hard requirement), C language expertise for UNIX embedded development, or Linux kernel modification experience. Their career has been built on web/full-stack technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, React, MongoDB) rather than embedded firmware, security protocols, or network switch products. The role requires deep embedded networking and security domain expertise that is absent from the resume.
strengths: 15+ years of software development experience across multiple domains, exceeding the 3+ year requirement
Demonstrated systems-level work at National Instruments with C/C++ components, plus exposure to Linux environments
Proven ability to master diverse programming languages and technologies, suggesting capacity to learn new systems
concerns: No evidence of Japanese language proficiency; resume shows only English (fluent), Romanian, and German—a hard requirement for the role
Career built entirely on web/full-stack technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, React); no embedded firmware, C-based UNIX development, or security protocol experience

No demonstrated experience with required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption), networking protocols (NETCONF, SNMP, Layer-2/3), or embedded device work (bootloaders, chip SDKs, network switches)

key_factors.factor: Network security and embedded networking domain knowledge
